description: Pass/fail rubric for the ShiftWork doc-to-deploy demo simulation — human demoer browser drive with video recording. Each criterion is scored PASS, FAIL, or PARTIAL with evidence. Overall verdict is PASS only if all MUST-PASS criteria pass and at least 80% of all criteria pass.

verdictRules.pass: All MUST-PASS criteria pass AND at least 80% of all criteria pass
verdictRules.partial: All MUST-PASS criteria pass AND 60-79% of all criteria pass
verdictRules.fail: Any MUST-PASS criterion fails OR fewer than 60% of all criteria pass

criteria.name: Ostack discipline loaded
criteria.check: skill_manage was called for opulentia-engineering-discipline and completed successfully
criteria.evidenceRequired: Tool call log showing skill_manage with opulentia-engineering-discipline, status completed
criteria.passCondition: skill_manage result includes 'opulentia-engineering-discipline' with status completed
criteria.failCondition: skill_manage was not called, or failed, or wrong skill was loaded

criteria.name: Video recording started
criteria.check: ffmpeg screen capture or cua-driver recording was started before navigating to the platform
criteria.evidenceRequired: ffmpeg process running or cua-driver recording state enabled, confirmed before step 3
criteria.passCondition: Recording was started before the browser navigated to the platform
criteria.failCondition: Recording was not started or started after navigation

criteria.name: Platform login page loaded
criteria.check: The Opulent platform login page loaded in the browser with email and password fields visible
criteria.evidenceRequired: Screenshot of login page with form fields visible
criteria.passCondition: Login page rendered with email and password fields
criteria.failCondition: Page did not load or login form is not visible

criteria.name: Logged in with demo credentials
criteria.check: Demo credentials were entered and login succeeded. Dashboard is visible.
criteria.evidenceRequired: Screenshot of dashboard after login, no error messages
criteria.passCondition: Dashboard rendered with workspace list, agent list, or main UI visible. No error messages.
criteria.failCondition: Login failed, error message shown, or dashboard did not load

criteria.name: Demo workspace created through UI
criteria.check: A workspace was created through the UI with the name 'ShiftWork Demo Simulation {{RUN_STAMP}}'
criteria.evidenceRequired: Screenshot showing the workspace in the workspace list
criteria.passCondition: Workspace is visible in the UI with the correct name
criteria.failCondition: Workspace was not created or is not visible in the UI

criteria.name: Training doc uploaded through UI
criteria.check: The training doc fixture was uploaded to the workspace through the UI file upload feature
criteria.evidenceRequired: Screenshot showing the file in the workspace file list
criteria.passCondition: Training doc file is visible in the workspace file list in the UI
criteria.failCondition: File upload failed or file is not visible in the UI

criteria.name: Build instruction typed into chat composer
criteria.check: The full build instruction was typed into the unified chat input and sent to a new thread
criteria.evidenceRequired: Screenshot of the typed message in the composer before sending, and screenshot of the sent message in the thread
criteria.passCondition: Message is visible in the thread and the build agent begins responding
criteria.failCondition: Chat composer did not accept the message or the message was not sent

criteria.name: Build agent streaming visible in transcript
criteria.check: The build agent's streaming text responses are visible in the thread transcript as they are generated
criteria.evidenceRequired: Screenshot showing streaming text or agent response in the thread
criteria.passCondition: Agent responses are visible and updating in real-time in the thread UI
criteria.failCondition: No agent response visible or streaming is broken/stalled

criteria.name: Tool call chips visible in transcript
criteria.check: Tool call chips (skill_manage, list_files, read_file, document_create, cron_manage, write_file) are visible in the transcript as the build agent works
criteria.evidenceRequired: Screenshot showing tool call chips in the thread
criteria.passCondition: At least 3 different tool call chips are visible in the transcript
criteria.failCondition: No tool call chips visible

criteria.name: Automation modeler skill invocation visible
criteria.check: The skill_manage call for opulentia-automation-modeler is visible in the transcript
criteria.evidenceRequired: Screenshot showing skill_manage tool chip or text mentioning opulentia-automation-modeler in the thread
criteria.passCondition: Automation modeler invocation is visible in the transcript
criteria.failCondition: No evidence of automation modeler in the transcript

criteria.name: Verified Automation Report visible in document panel
criteria.check: The Verified Automation Report appears in the document panel or workspace as the build agent produces it
criteria.evidenceRequired: Screenshot showing the report in the document panel or workspace file list
criteria.passCondition: Report is visible in the UI with title containing 'Verified Automation Report'
criteria.failCondition: Report was not produced or not visible in the UI

criteria.name: Cron schedule creation visible in transcript
criteria.check: The cron_manage tool call is visible in the transcript with the schedule details
criteria.evidenceRequired: Screenshot showing cron_manage tool chip or schedule creation text in the thread
criteria.passCondition: Cron schedule creation is visible in the transcript
criteria.failCondition: No evidence of cron schedule creation in the transcript

criteria.name: Screenshots appearing in workspace during acceptance
criteria.check: Screenshot artifacts appear in the workspace as the build agent runs the acceptance test
criteria.evidenceRequired: Screenshot of the workspace file list showing screenshot files, or screenshot of the workspace with new image artifacts
criteria.passCondition: At least 4 screenshot files are visible in the workspace
criteria.failCondition: No screenshots visible in the workspace

criteria.name: Run report visible in workspace
criteria.check: A run report is visible in the workspace after the acceptance test
criteria.evidenceRequired: Screenshot of the workspace file list showing the report file, or screenshot of the report opened in the UI
criteria.passCondition: Report file is visible in the workspace UI
criteria.failCondition: No report visible in the workspace

criteria.name: autos_done visible in thread
criteria.check: The build agent's autos_done call is visible in the thread transcript with the demo marker
criteria.evidenceRequired: Screenshot of the thread showing autos_done completion with marker SHIFTWORK_DEMO_SIMULATION_TOKEN_{{RUN_STAMP}}
criteria.passCondition: autos_done is visible in the thread with the marker
criteria.failCondition: autos_done is not visible or marker is missing

criteria.name: How-to guide visible in workspace
criteria.check: The how-to guide is visible in the workspace after acceptance passes
criteria.evidenceRequired: Screenshot of the workspace file list showing the how-to guide, or screenshot of the guide opened in the UI
criteria.passCondition: How-to guide is visible in the workspace UI with title containing 'How to use your Visual QA Agent'
criteria.failCondition: No how-to guide visible in the workspace

criteria.name: Cron schedule visible in UI settings
criteria.check: The cron schedule (weekday 8 AM Central) is visible in the agent's schedule or trigger management UI
criteria.evidenceRequired: Screenshot of the schedule settings showing the cron expression or human-readable schedule
criteria.passCondition: Schedule shows '0 8 * * 1-5' or 'Weekday 8:00 AM' in America/Chicago timezone in the UI
criteria.failCondition: Schedule is not visible in the UI
criteria.partialCondition: Schedule exists but timezone or expression is wrong in the UI

criteria.name: No React #185 crash during session
criteria.check: No React error #185 (Maximum update depth exceeded) occurred at any point during the browser session
criteria.evidenceRequired: No 'Minified React error #185' or 'Maximum update depth exceeded' visible in any screenshot, page text, or browser console during the entire session
criteria.passCondition: No React #185 crash occurred during the entire session
criteria.failCondition: React #185 crash occurred at any point

criteria.name: Streaming responsive (no long stalls)
criteria.check: The build agent's streaming responses did not stall for more than 30 seconds at any point during the session
criteria.evidenceRequired: Video evidence showing continuous streaming activity, or timestamps showing no gaps > 30s in agent responses
criteria.passCondition: No streaming stalls longer than 30 seconds
criteria.failCondition: Streaming stalled for more than 60 seconds at any point

criteria.name: Document panel renders correctly
criteria.check: The document panel renders the Verified Automation Report and how-to guide correctly — readable, no layout breakage, no missing content
criteria.evidenceRequired: Screenshot of the document panel showing rendered content
criteria.passCondition: Document panel renders content correctly with no layout issues
criteria.failCondition: Document panel is broken, empty, or has layout issues
criteria.partialCondition: Document panel renders but with minor visual issues

criteria.name: No error messages visible to demoer
criteria.check: No unhandled error messages, toast notifications, or error boundaries were visible to the demoer during the session
criteria.evidenceRequired: No error toasts, error banners, or error pages in any screenshot or video frame
criteria.passCondition: No error messages visible during the session
criteria.failCondition: Error messages were visible to the demoer
criteria.partialCondition: Minor warnings visible but no critical errors

criteria.name: Video recording valid and complete
criteria.check: The video recording is a valid MP4 file, playable, with duration > 60 seconds, capturing the session from login to completion
criteria.evidenceRequired: ffprobe output confirming valid H.264/AAC MP4 with yuv420p and +faststart, file size > 0, duration > 60s
criteria.passCondition: Video is valid, playable, duration > 60s, captures login through completion
criteria.failCondition: Video is missing, corrupt, or shorter than 60 seconds
criteria.partialCondition: Video is valid but does not capture the full session (started late or stopped early)

criteria.name: Findings report produced with verdict
criteria.check: A findings report JSON was produced with overall verdict, per-criterion results, evidence, video path, and demoer feedback
criteria.evidenceRequired: Findings report JSON file at the expected path with all fields populated
criteria.passCondition: Findings report is valid JSON with overall verdict, all criteria scored, evidence, video path, and feedback section
criteria.failCondition: No findings report or it is missing required fields

criteria.name: Demoer feedback written
criteria.check: A feedback section was written covering: what worked well, what was confusing or broken, performance issues, crashes, and suggestions for improvement
criteria.evidenceRequired: Feedback section in the findings report with all 5 areas covered
criteria.passCondition: Feedback covers all 5 areas with specific examples from the session
criteria.failCondition: No feedback section or it is missing required areas
criteria.partialCondition: Feedback covers some but not all 5 areas

criteria.name: Completion marker emitted
criteria.check: The demo simulation completed with the SHIFTWORK_DEMO_SIMULATION_COMPLETE marker
criteria.evidenceRequired: autos_done call with result including SHIFTWORK_DEMO_SIMULATION_COMPLETE
criteria.passCondition: Completion marker was emitted
criteria.failCondition: Completion marker was not emitted

criteria.name: Fallback URL used if primary is down
criteria.check: If shiftworkstudio.ai was unreachable during the acceptance test, the build agent used the fallback URL https://example.com
criteria.evidenceRequired: Video or transcript evidence showing fallback URL usage if primary was down, or primary was reachable so fallback was not needed
criteria.passCondition: Either primary URL worked, or fallback was used when primary was down
criteria.failCondition: Primary was down and no fallback was used
criteria.skipCondition: Primary URL was reachable (fallback not needed — mark as PASS with note)

summary.passThreshold: All 14 MUST-PASS pass AND at least 80% of all 26 pass (>= 21)
summary.failThreshold: Any MUST-PASS fails OR fewer than 16 criteria pass
